metric: per-lead gridpoint-paired bias+rmse vs CPU-WRF wrfout

scoring_policy.basis: principal decision 2026-06-03 (council-proven): native-init h1 cold-start spin-up is inherent — CPU-WRF t0 wrfout QKE/TKE_PBL/PBLH are zero and UST~1e-4, so BOTH codes equilibrate over h1. Core PASS judged from h2+; h1 reported non-blocking. Frozen continuous_gate margins UNCHANGED (lead-inclusion only).
scoring_policy.honest_claim: native-init forecast matches CPU-WRF from h2+ after a documented first-hour cold-start transient; h1 not claimed as nowcast parity
